:name is released under the MIT License,: :name is released under the MIT License, the whole source, no strings. Read it, fork it, ship it commercially, run it on your own hardware. No vendor lock-in, ever.

A collection can use many types; an item: A collection can use many types; an item picks exactly one.
A collection holds a set of items, give: A collection holds a set of items, give it a name and set who can see it.
A full trail of every location this item: A full trail of every location this item has moved between over time.

A new field group was added to the type.
A new verification link has been sent to: A new verification link has been sent to the email address you provided during registration.
A portable JSON snapshot of this type's: A portable JSON snapshot of this type's fields, groups and options.
A reset link will be sent if the account: A reset link will be sent if the account exists.
A series links related items into a broa: A series links related items into a broader franchise or body of work, like Harry Potter or Marvel, regardless of type or collection. Unlike sets, a series has no target and no completion.
A set is a checklist of the items that b: A set is a checklist of the items that belong together: a full run, a series, a want list. Beaver tracks which ones you own and how close you are to complete.
A set lives inside one collection and co: A set lives inside one collection and counts towards a target. A series does neither: it reaches across every collection in the account to gather everything from one franchise, whatever shape it takes.
A type cannot have more than :max fields: A type cannot have more than :max fields.
A type cannot have more than :max groups: A type cannot have more than :max groups.
API keys are like secret passwords that: API keys are like secret passwords that allow other tools or apps to connect securely to your account.
Absolutely, that is the point of MIT. Op: Absolutely, that is the point of MIT. Open an issue, send a pull request, or fork it entirely. The roadmap is public and community driven.

Activity across every account on this Be: Activity across every account on this Beaver instance.

Automatically delete the account and all: Automatically delete the account and all the data after 6 months of inactivity. Please be certain.
Beaver does not collect user reviews yet: Beaver does not collect user reviews yet. When it does, you will moderate them here before they appear on the marketing site.

Catalog comics, books, vinyl, trading ca: Catalog comics, books, vinyl, trading cards, wine, watches, games, anything you collect. Own your data. Self-host or use the cloud.
Catalog details apply to the item; each: Catalog details apply to the item; each physical copy tracks its own condition and location.
Categories let you shelve items into mea: Categories let you shelve items into meaningful groups instead of one long list. Filter by them, and nest them a level deep for finer structure.
Change the details of this collection. I: Change the details of this collection. Its items are left untouched.

Delete this location? Nested locations w: Delete this location? Nested locations will be deleted too. This cannot be undone.

Delete this provenance event? This canno: Delete this provenance event? This cannot be undone.

Delete this tag? It will be removed from: Delete this tag? It will be removed from every item it's applied to. This cannot be undone.
